news.summary: Life Flight Network, the leading not-for-profit air ambulance provider in the country, has revealed plans to commence operations on Hawai'i Island starting in the upcoming fall season. A total investment of $27 million will be made by Life Flight Network towards its operations in Hawai'i.
news.headline: Life Flight Network to expand into Hawai'i with $27M investment for new air medical operations, beginning fall 2025.

news.summary: In an unprecedented partnership lasting 5.5 years, elite sports science and hydration expertise will be provided to future female F1 drivers. Gatorade® has made history by becoming the inaugural official sports drink partner of F1 ACADEMY™, ensuring global exposure for the collaboration.
news.headline: Gatorade® and F1 ACADEMY™ launch a 5.5-year partnership to support female F1 drivers with sports science and hydration.

news.summary: Scheduled for June 12, 2025 in Toronto, D2L, a leading global learning technology company, is hosting its annual user conference centered around the themes of artificial intelligence and the fun of learning. The conference will feature prominent speaker Ryan Leak, noted New York Times best-selling author and engaging speaker. This event aims to delve into the potential of AI in educational technology and the satisfaction derived from acquiring knowledge. Stay tuned for more updates on the event.
news.headline: Bestselling author Ryan Leak to keynote at D2L Fusion 2025 conference in Toronto, exploring AI and joy of learning.

news.summary: Sanford, Florida - On June 12, 2025, Hoverfly Technologies, the sole TeUAS manufacturer on DIU's Blue List, received significant orders to support the domestic industrial base. These orders aim to expedite procurement and strengthen the American-made tethered drone solutions industry.
news.headline: Hoverfly Technologies supports executive orders to boost American UAS technology. Hoverfly is the only TeUAS maker on DIU's Blue List.

news.summary: A law firm, Halper Sadeh LLC, is currently looking into potential breaches of fiduciary duties and violations of federal securities laws in connection to the sale of AZEK Company Inc. (NYSE: AZEK). This investigation comes after the recent news of the acquisition deal involving AZEK. The firm is focusing on ensuring shareholder rights and evaluating any possible legal implications of this transaction. Shareholders of AZEK are encouraged to stay informed about this investigation as more details unfold.
news.headline: Halper Sadeh LLC investigates AZEK, TASK, AXL for possible securities law violations on behalf of shareholders.

news.summary: Canary Technologies, a prominent figure in AI-powered guest-facing hotel technology, has secured new funding that will further propel its global expansion. The company, headquartered in San Francisco, revealed on June 12, 2025, that it is the top player in the field of hotel guest management technology. This influx of capital underscores Canary's position as a key leader in the industry and marks a significant step in their journey.
news.headline: Canary Technologies secures $80M funding to expand globally as the leading AI-powered guest-facing hotel tech provider.

news.summary: In Paris on June 12, 2025, diaMentis, a company specializing in advanced diagnostic support technology for mental health, has been acknowledged by the U.S. Food and Drug Administration (FDA) for its groundbreaking scientific achievement. The company has been chosen by Dassault Systèmes to be part of its exclusive program.
news.headline: diaMentis joins Dassault Systèmes' accelerator program after FDA recognition for mental health tech innovation.

news.summary: In Boston, MA on June 12, 2025, Netcapital Inc. (Nasdaq: NCPL, NCPLW) disclosed the addition of Matt Morgan to its newly formed Crypto Advisory Board. The Company, known for its digital private capital markets platform, made this announcement today.
news.headline: Matt Morgan joins Netcapital's Crypto Advisory Board, effective June 12, 2025, enhancing their digital private capital markets ecosystem. Nasdaq: NCPL, NCPLW.

news.summary: Philip Morris International Inc.'s U.S. business, PMI U.S., has appointed Jody Sunna as the U.S. Chief Communications Officer, starting on September 1, 2025. Sunna will oversee corporate, regulatory, civil society, and category communications for PMI's U.S. operations. Additionally, she will be a part of the PMI U.S. Senior Management Team. Sunna's background includes leadership positions within PMI's global organization.
news.headline: PMI U.S. names Jody Sunna as Chief Communications Officer, effective September 1, 2025. Sunna will oversee communications across PMI's U.S. operations.

news.summary: Tether has recently made an investment in Elemental Altus Royalties in Canada as part of its strategic move to incorporate enduring and secure assets like gold and Bitcoin within its network. This aligns with the company's focus on integrating stable and long-term investments to strengthen its ecosystem.
news.headline: Tether acquires 32% share in Canadian gold royalty firm, aligning with strategy to blend gold and Bitcoin assets.

news.summary: In Columbia, South Carolina on June 12, 2025, Laura Celeste Updegraff, MBA, MS has been recognized in The Inner Circle as a Pinnacle Professional Member Inner Circle of Excellence for her notable achievements in a distinguished career in the U.S. Army and Human Resources.
news.headline: Laura Celeste Updegraff, MBA, MS is recognized as a Pinnacle Professional Member in The Inner Circle for her career in U.S. Army and Human Resources.

news.summary: In Mountain View, California, Windsurf, a prominent AI software development company, revealed the establishment of its inaugural GPU cluster in Germany amidst soaring product demand and an expansion of capabilities across the EU. The company, which already caters to more than 100 enterprise customers in the region, is taking its first significant international stride by setting up this cluster to enhance scalability for the European market. Positioned in Frankfurt, known for stringent data privacy regulations, this new infrastructure initiative highlights Windsurf's commitment to meeting growing demands in the region.
news.headline: Windsurf deploys first GPU cluster in Germany to meet demand, with over 100 local EU customers. Expanding AI infrastructure.

news.summary: Starting in 2025, Cam Newton and Ashley Nicole Moss will be co-hosting a brand new weekly series, as revealed at the "BET Awards." The show, titled "BET 106 & Sports," was officially announced during the event. This collaboration was confirmed on the stage of the event, where Newton and Moss presented a sneak peek of the upcoming series. Under the partnership with BET Media Group, viewers can expect a dynamic and engaging program. The announcement came on June 12, 2025, in New York City, and is set to bring exciting content to audiences.
news.headline: BET and Fulwell Entertainment's SpringHill announce "106 & Sports" with hosts Cam Newton & Ashley Nicole Moss at BET Awards 2025.

news.summary: In Pittsburgh on June 12, 2025, an inventor from San Diego, California, shared their inspiration behind the creation of a unique foot rest designed to facilitate foot washing during showers or baths. Termed the "FOOT REST," this innovation was devised to provide a convenient solution without requiring individuals to bend. This product aims to streamline the foot-cleaning process and enhance bathing experiences.
news.headline: Inventor from San Diego creates FOOT REST for washing feet while showering or bathing to eliminate bending.

news.summary: A recently passed law in Las Vegas, signed by Governor Lombardo, aims to enhance bill predictability, customer savings, and regulatory oversight for natural gas services. The law, known as Senate Bill 417 (SB 417), has been welcomed by Southwest Gas Corporation. This legislation focuses on modernizing the natural gas sector to ensure transparency and efficiency. Southwest Gas Corporation appreciates the proactive steps taken by Governor Lombardo and looks forward to the positive impacts of SB 417.
news.headline: Southwest Gas praises Gov. Lombardo for signing SB 417, improving Nevada's regulatory framework for natural gas.

news.summary: Micron's high bandwidth memory (HBM3E) with a capacity of 36GB and 12-high design, along with the AMD Instinct™ MI350 Series GPUs and platforms, are driving AI data center innovation and growth. These cutting-edge technologies are playing a crucial role in pushing forward the advancement of AI applications in data centers.
news.headline: Micron's HBM3E 36GB memory integrated into AMD's AI platform to boost data center innovation.

news.summary: Houston-based company DYOPATH was recently listed on the prestigious 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list by The Channel Company. This annual list highlights the top IT service providers in North America based on revenue, showcasing the industry leaders. The combined revenue of the companies on the list totaled $548.9 billion, emphasizing their significant role in driving growth in the IT sector and global technology channel.
news.headline: DYOPATH makes 2025 CRN Solution Provider 500 list for largest NA tech companies with $548.9 billion revenue.

news.summary: InPlay Inc., a company based in Irvine, California, has revealed the launch of its latest NanoBeacon System-on-Chip (SoC), the IN120. This new SoC is tailored for high-volume smart label uses and is designed to bring about significant benefits in terms of simplicity, cost-effectiveness, and manufacturing efficiency. The innovative design of the IN120 stands out for its minimalist approach, needing just a single external component – a 26MHz crystal. This technological advancement aims to streamline processes and reduce costs for businesses utilizing smart label applications.
news.headline: InPlay announces release of 2nd-Gen NanoBeacon IN120 SoC for smart label makers, with only 1 external component.

news.summary: In Dublin, the market analysis report titled "Cadmium Market in China: 2019-2024 Review and Forecast to 2029" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. This report serves as a crucial tool for individuals seeking comprehensive insights into the Cadmium market in China. The analysis spans from 2019 to 2024 with forecasts extending to 2029, focusing on aspects such as supply and demand, pricing trends, and the influence on downstream industries. Alongside high-quality tables and figures, the report also provides detailed textual content, making it a valuable resource for industry stakeholders.
news.headline: China Cadmium market: Report covers 2019-2024 analysis and 2025-2029 forecasts for supply, demand, prices - ResearchAndMarkets.com.

news.summary: A significant development was shared by We Store Frozen, a prominent company in cold storage and logistics, as they disclosed their expansion into frozen fruits and vegetables sector. The company sealed a notable $15 million deal today for a three-year agreement with a key partner. This move is poised to play a crucial role in the company’s growth strategy in the cold storage sector.
news.headline: We Store Frozen secures $15M deal with H-E-B to expand into frozen fruits and vegetables. #growth #logistics

news.summary: Supermicro has introduced advanced AI solutions featuring the AMD Instinct MI350 Series GPUs and AMD ROCm™ Software, achieving remarkable inference performance and energy efficiency. The cutting-edge Supermicro H14 GPU solutions utilize the latest 4th generation AMD CDNA™ architecture, offering enhanced capabilities for AI applications.
news.headline: Supermicro launches AI solutions with AMD Instinct MI350 GPUs for breakthrough inference performance and efficiency.

news.summary: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. has appointed eight new members to the CDC's Advisory Committee on Immunization Practices (ACIP), replacing all 17 previous advisers. Kennedy cited the need to restore public trust in vaccine science and alleged conflicts of interest among the prior Biden-appointed members. The new committee, comprising the minimum required number of members under ACIP's charter, includes Martin Kulldorff, a biostatistician and epidemiologist critical of COVID-19 lockdowns and vaccine mandates. This move has sparked scrutiny, especially considering the controversy surrounding Kennedy's involvement in a Merck lawsuit ahead of a Senate hearing. Visit Benzinga.com for more details.
news.headline: RFK Jr. appoints 8 new members to CDC's ACIP, dismissing all 17 existing advisers. Kennedy aims to boost public confidence in vaccine science after alleging conflicts of interest. Martin Kulldorff, COVID-19 critic, appointed to committee.

news.summary: Vultr, a cloud provider based in West Palm Beach, Florida, has recently revealed that they are one of the pioneering companies to provide access to the latest AMD Instinct™ MI355X GPU. This advancement allows customers to leverage the cutting-edge technology for their cloud computing needs, enhancing performance and capabilities. It signifies a significant step forward in the industry, demonstrating Vultr's commitment to staying at the forefront of technological innovations.
news.headline: Vultr to offer AMD Instinct™ MI355X GPU for AI workloads, enhancing performance and efficiency in cloud computing.

news.summary: In Las Vegas, TensorWave, a prominent leader in AMD-powered AI infrastructure solutions, revealed the incorporation of AMD Instinct™ MI355X GPUs into their cutting-edge cloud platform. Pioneering as one of the initial cloud service providers to introduce the AMD Instinct MI355X, TensorWave empowers clients to access top-tier performance for highly rigorous AI tasks, along with unparalleled personalized setup assistance and support. The latest AMD Instinct MI355X GPU is structured on the 4th Gen AMD CD, marking a significant advancement.
news.headline: TensorWave deploys AMD Instinct MI355X GPUs in high-performance cloud platform, offering advanced AI workload acceleration for customers.
